steps.title: Show the reason for maintenance
steps.content: The first sentence establishes the cause: Cairo residents rely on the Cairo Metro for millions of trips each year. The second sentence describes the response: transit officials work to maintain the system's stations so those many journeys go smoothly.

steps.title: Reject the wrong relationships
steps.content: Choice B signals a contrast, but there is no conflict between heavy reliance on the Metro and officials maintaining it. Choice C would introduce an example, not a consequence. Choice D would signal an alternative option, which does not fit the maintenance response. The answer is A.
